description: This file defines the main Application class for the Android app, responsible for initializing essential components like TokenStore, AuthManager, and ApiClient, managing app startup safety modes, handling uncaught exceptions, and providing accessors for API client creation.

classes.name: SecureSampleApp
classes.description: Main Application class managing app initialization, crash handling, and safe mode toggling, tailored for Android biometric authentication sample.

methods.name: onCreate
methods.description: Overrides Application.onCreate to initialize app components, set crash handler, and configure safe mode.

methods.name: recordInitFailureIfEmpty
methods.description: Records initialization failure messages if not already recorded, setting safe mode.

methods.name: getOrCreateApiClient
methods.description: Returns existing API client or lazily creates a new one if safe mode isn't enabled.
